name: stocks-interface
description: Real-time stock market data, watchlist management, and price alerts powered by Finnhub.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. AAPL, TSLA, SPY)

symbols.description: Comma-separated list of ticker symbols for multi-stock comparison (e.g. AAPL,MSFT,GOOGL)

period.description: Historical data period — one of: 7d, 30d, 90d, 1y, ytd

targetPrice.description: Target price level for a price alert

direction.description: Alert trigger direction — one of: above, below

alertId.description: Unique identifier of a price alert to retrieve or delete

daysAhead.description: Number of calendar days ahead to look for earnings events

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (e.g. news articles)

type.description: Symbol type hint for watchlist-add — one of: stock, etf, index

message.description: Optional custom note to attach to a price alert
